questionHtml: Use the regression equation to estimate the BMI of an adult man whose waist size is 95 cm.
markschemeHtml:
correct substitution into their regression equation       (A1)

eg      0.141(95) + 11.1

24.5488

24.5       A1 N2

[2 marks]
